LanguageData.VNPE_NutrientPastePipe.description: Light steel pipes for transporting the sludge known as nutrient paste from grinders and storage vats to dispensers.
LanguageData.VNPE_NutrientPastePipe.label: nutrient paste pipe
LanguageData.VNPE_NutrientPasteValve.label: nutrient paste valve
LanguageData.VNPE_UndergroundNutrientPastePipe.descri: Subterranean steel pipes for transporting the sludge known as nutrient paste from grinders and storage vats to dispensers.
LanguageData.VNPE_UndergroundNutrientPastePipe.label: subterranean nutrient paste pipe
